segments.text: Here's one mistake rich people never commit. Nobody told the rest of us. So,
I was reading about how when the Tata Group needed 7,000 crores, they did not sell their TCS shares. They pledged 30 million of them, took the loan, and kept

TCS growing in the background. Elon Musk, in fact, did the same thing with his Tesla [music] shares when he bought Twitter because they know you never sell your best assets [music] when you need cash. Instead, you borrow against them.
But most of us kind of do the opposite.
The moment an emergency hits, medical bills, a wedding, a [music] car breakdown, we either break our FDS, sell our investments, or take personal loans at really high interest rates. [music]
The thing is, you don't have to do that anymore. Moiqu now offers loan against
mutual funds. So instead of breaking your portfolio, you get instant funds [music] starting at 10.5% interest,
which means your mutual funds keep compounding and you still get the money when you need it. Plus, you only pay monthly interest [music] and you can repay the principal whenever you want.
Now, as with any financial product, do read the FAQs and [music] terms and conditions before jumping in. It is subject to market risks and lender terms. But if this sounds useful to you,
check it out on the mobile app. link is in the description.
